summary: Comprehensive testing of VanaLedger carbon credit tree plantation management system - all core functionality working perfectly
passed_tests: Authentication flow with Google OAuth session tokens working
Dashboard page loads with correct metrics and recent claims display
Programs CRUD - Create, List, View, Delete programs working
Farmers CRUD - Create, List, View farmers working with program association
Claims CRUD - Create, List, Review claims working with proper validation
Claim approval workflow - Approve/Reject claims with verifier notes
Ledger updates automatically after claim approval
Dashboard stats update in real-time after operations
All export endpoints working - CSV, PDF, JSON downloads successful
WhatsApp webhook endpoints (JOIN, CLAIM, STATUS) all functional
Carbon credit estimation formula working correctly
Sidebar navigation works between all pages
Responsive design and Forest Canopy green theme applied
All forms validate required fields properly
MongoDB integration working with proper data persistence
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (21/21 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all workflows tested successfully)
